tasks.subject: Task 1: Create email-heartbeat routine
tasks.description:
**Goal:** New cron routine that fires every 30 min, finds all active onboarding cases, checks for candidate replies, nudges if 24h elapsed.

**Files:**
- Create: `agents/hr/routines/email-heartbeat.md`

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] cron trigger every 30min
- [ ] reads audit-log for active cases
- [ ] nudge only after 24h
- [ ] no duplicate nudges
- [ ] data sensitivity section present

```json:metadata
{"files": ["agents/hr/routines/email-heartbeat.md"], "verifyCommand": "cat agents/hr/routines/email-heartbeat.md", "acceptanceCriteria": ["cron trigger every 30min", "reads audit-log for active cases", "nudge only after 24h", "no duplicate nudges", "data sensitivity section present"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 2: Simplify Phase 3 in employee-onboarding routine
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Remove vague polling logic from Phase 3 — heartbeat owns polling.

**Files:**
- Modify: `agents/hr/routines/employee-onboarding.md` (Phase 3 section)

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] no polling in Phase 3
- [ ] heartbeat ownership documented
- [ ] threshold table present (24h/48h/72h)

```json:metadata
{"files": ["agents/hr/routines/employee-onboarding.md"], "verifyCommand": "grep -n 'outlook_search_emails' agents/hr/routines/employee-onboarding.md", "acceptanceCriteria": ["no polling in Phase 3", "heartbeat ownership documented", "threshold table present"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 3: Add Aadhaar masking rules
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Explicit government-ID redaction constraint in AGENTS.md, onboarding routine, and document-validator skill.

**Files:**
- Modify: `agents/hr/AGENTS.md`
- Modify: `agents/hr/routines/employee-onboarding.md` (Phase 5)
- Modify: `agents/hr/skills/document-validator.md` (Steps 4 and 5)

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] masking rule in AGENTS.md
- [ ] masking note in Phase 5
- [ ] REDACTED placeholder in document-validator steps 4 and 5

```json:metadata
{"files": ["agents/hr/AGENTS.md", "agents/hr/routines/employee-onboarding.md", "agents/hr/skills/document-validator.md"], "verifyCommand": "grep -l 'REDACTED|never output|redact' agents/hr/AGENTS.md agents/hr/routines/employee-onboarding.md agents/hr/skills/document-validator.md", "acceptanceCriteria": ["masking rule in AGENTS.md", "masking note in Phase 5", "REDACTED placeholder in document-validator steps 4 and 5"]}
```
